Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-13-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Evan J. Smith, Esq., of Brodsky Smith, (877) 534-2590, for Plaintiff.
David M. Barnes, Esq., of Hogan Lovells Us LLP, (415) 374-2300, for Defendant.
Adam I. Gafni, Esq., of Gafni & Levin LLP, (310) 623-1926, for Non-Party Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc.

Not argued/contested. Plaintiff Emma Bell's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted. The warning required by the settlement is compliant, the award of attorney's fees is reasonable, and the penalty amount is reasonable. (Health & Safety Code 25249.7(f)(4).)

***After hearing, an order is signed.
